title: Claymore
description: More sword per sword in each sword -[≡≡≡>
body:
This mod adds a way to upgrade to your old and reliable Iron Sword, allowing you to have more of it whenever you need. Simply take one of your swords, and then another one, and then just a stick???
That's right you can just use your Swords to craft bigger SWORDS!
(Wonder what would happen if I used BIG SWORDS to try and craft a bigger sword?)

![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/85NWIsz2/images/f8e7466f607c13e3ae28f7f95849e52a1a4f17a5.png)

Features:
- some cool and powerful weapons
- funny advancements
